# CHAMBER-Bench v1.0 task cards

One card per task version in the pinned suite composition. The
registry (`chamber.tasks`) is the single source of truth; these
pages and the README task table render from it ([`adr/ADR-027-chamber-bench-v1-protocol.md`](https://github.com/fsafaei/concerto/blob/main/adr/ADR-027-chamber-bench-v1-protocol.md)).

Emit the machine-readable manifest with:

```console
$ chamber-eval manifest
```
